channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Patriot Front's public image masks its true nature and funding sources
item.description: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in Washington, D.C. on July Fourth. Who are they and where does their money come from?

item.title: Trump threatens Iran after funeral chants call for his killing
item.description: Trump responded on Truth Social after U.S. officials demanded Iran publicly declare the Strait of Hormuz open.

item.title: Virtual reality dance partners help shy people find their rhythm
item.description: Apps like Dance Guru and Trip the Light provide a judgment-free way to learn partner dancing through VR.

item.title: Minnesota withdraws National Guard from Washington D.C. early amid growing pressure on Michigan
item.description: Governor Tim Walz is pulling Minnesota National Guard troops from D.C. earlier than planned as criticism mounts against Democratic governors for deploying forces to the capital.
